page_metadata.biotools__summary: This package contains the necessary functions to assign the five intrinsic molecular subtypes (Luminal A, Luminal B, Her2-enriched, Basal-like, Normal-like). The assignments could be done on individual samples as well as on dataset of gene expression data.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: This package contains the necessary functions to assign the five intrinsic molecular subtypes (Luminal A, Luminal B, Her2-enriched, Basal-like, Normal-like). The assignments could be done on individual samples as well as on dataset of gene expression data.
